name: Mitt Romney
abstract: Willard Mitt Romney (born March 12, 1947) is an American businessman and retired politician who served as a United States senator from Utah from 2019 to 2025 and as the 70th governor of Massachusetts from 2003 to 2007. A member of the Republican Party, he was the party's nominee in the 2012 presidential election.

about_quotes.speaker: Jang
about_quotes.evidence: if Mitt Romney had been elected I wouldn’t have been so emotional about it.
